narrative.description: Square's PS1 swan song returns to high fantasy with Active Time Events, ability-learning equipment, and a ensemble cast journey from Alexandria to the Iifa Tree and Memoria.
narrative.core_loop: Travel the world map, equip gear to learn abilities permanently, fight in ATB battles with Trance limits, and unravel Kuja's plot across four discs.

mechanics.map_notes: ATB gauges fill while players select commands under time pressure.
mechanics.expression: ATB gauges fill while players select commands under time pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: Levels, stats, and permanently learned abilities grow through combat and AP.
mechanics.expression: Levels, stats, and permanently learned abilities grow through combat and AP.

mechanics.map_notes: Weapons and armor teach abilities via AP before mastery unlocks permanently.
mechanics.expression: Weapons and armor teach abilities via AP before mastery unlocks permanently.

mechanics.map_notes: Four-character party rotates through command menus each turn.
mechanics.expression: Four-character party rotates through command menus each turn.

mechanics.map_notes: Story bosses unlock airships, continents, and narrative chapters.
mechanics.expression: Story bosses unlock airships, continents, and narrative chapters.

mechanics.map_notes: Trance and boss transformations shift combat mid-fight.
mechanics.expression: Trance and boss transformations shift combat mid-fight.

mechanics.map_notes: Chocobo hot spots, tetra master, and side quests extend play.
mechanics.expression: Chocobo hot spots, tetra master, and side quests extend play.

mechanics.map_notes: Shops sell gear that gates ability learning speed.
mechanics.expression: Shops sell gear that gates ability learning speed.

mechanics.map_notes: Gil and item drops fund equipment progression.
mechanics.expression: Gil and item drops fund equipment progression.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Beatrix and Hades follow phase-based patterns.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Beatrix and Hades follow phase-based patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: HP and MP pools require rest and consumables.
mechanics.expression: HP and MP pools require rest and consumables.

mechanics.map_notes: Mognet saves and world map access checkpoint runs.
mechanics.expression: Mognet saves and world map access checkpoint runs.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss charge attacks display visible wind-up frames.
mechanics.expression: Boss charge attacks display visible wind-up frames.

mechanics.map_notes: Trance limits trigger automatically at full gauge.
mechanics.expression: Trance limits trigger automatically at full gauge.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Final Fantasy IX through its core rpg loop.
